pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 8 (TARGET_USER="arch_lead"), user creation payload lines 27-44, verifier.py line 28-29 expects this value
setup_task.sh lines 33-34 set firstName="Senior" and lastName="Architect", forming display name "Senior Architect"
setup_task.sh line 11 (WORKSPACE_PATH="/default-domain/workspaces/Projects") and line 12 (DOC_PATH="$WORKSPACE_PATH/System-Architecture"), document created at this path in lines 51-93
export_result.sh line 8 (OUTPUT_PATH="/home/ga/version_author.txt"), setup_task.sh line 134 cleans this file, task description line 5 specifies this path

privileged_info_summary: The task requires an agent to identify the author of Version 1.0 of 'System_Architecture.pdf' document in the Nuxeo platform. The correct answer is 'arch_lead' (user ID), who is also known as 'Senior Architect' (display name). The document is located at /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/System-Architecture. The agent must save the username (arch_lead) to /home/ga/version_author.txt. The task uses synthetic data: the Nuxeo platform, users, document, and version history are created by the setup script. Version 1.0 was created by arch_lead user through the Nuxeo REST API, while a subsequent Version 1.1 was created by the Administrator user to intentionally obscure the actual v1.0 author from the document summary page.
